export default abstract class AccountBase extends GoblEntity {

	public static readonly COLUMNS = [

	public static readonly COL_CLIENT_ID = 'account_client_id';
	public static readonly COL_LABEL = 'account_label';
	public static readonly COL_BALANCE = 'account_balance';
	public static readonly COL_CURRENCY_CODE = 'account_currency_code';
	public static readonly COL_DATA = 'account_data';
	public static readonly COL_CREATED_AT = 'account_created_at';
	public static readonly COL_UPDATED_AT = 'account_updated_at';
	public static readonly COL_VALID = 'account_valid';

	public singlePKValue():string {
		const id = this.id;
		if (id === undefined || id === null) {
			throw new Error('Cannot get single PK value for unsaved Account.');
		}
		return String(id);
	}
	public identifierColumns(): string[] {
		return [ AccountBase.COL_ID ];
	}
	get id(): string { return this._data[AccountBase.COL_ID]; }
	set id(nVal: string|number|null) { this._set(AccountBase.COL_ID, nVal); }

	get client_id(): string { return this._data[AccountBase.COL_CLIENT_ID]; }
	set client_id(nVal: string|number) { this._set(AccountBase.COL_CLIENT_ID, nVal); }

	get label(): string { return this._data[AccountBase.COL_LABEL]; }
	set label(nVal: string) { this._set(AccountBase.COL_LABEL, nVal); }

	get balance(): string { return this._data[AccountBase.COL_BALANCE]; }
	set balance(nVal: string|number|number) { this._set(AccountBase.COL_BALANCE, nVal); }

	get currency_code(): string { return this._data[AccountBase.COL_CURRENCY_CODE]; }
	set currency_code(nVal: string) { this._set(AccountBase.COL_CURRENCY_CODE, nVal); }

	get data(): Record<string, unknown> { return this._data[AccountBase.COL_DATA]; }
	set data(nVal: Record<string, unknown>|unknown[]) { this._set(AccountBase.COL_DATA, nVal); }

	get created_at(): string { return this._data[AccountBase.COL_CREATED_AT]; }
	set created_at(nVal: string|number) { this._set(AccountBase.COL_CREATED_AT, nVal); }

	get updated_at(): string { return this._data[AccountBase.COL_UPDATED_AT]; }
	set updated_at(nVal: string|number) { this._set(AccountBase.COL_UPDATED_AT, nVal); }

	get valid(): boolean { return this._data[AccountBase.COL_VALID]; }
	set valid(nVal: boolean) { this._set(AccountBase.COL_VALID, nVal); }

}
